2026-04-21IRCCImmigration and Refugee Protection ActReappointment of a full-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Toronto Regional Office)Reappointment of Linda Hart of Toronto, Ontario, as a full-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Toronto Regional Office), to hold office during good behaviour for a term of five years, effective April 30, 2026.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a full-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Toronto Regional Office)
precis: Reappointment of Linda Hart of Toronto, Ontario, as a full-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Toronto Regional Office), to hold office during good behaviour for a term of five years, effective April 30, 2026.
